title: Parkside Commons Community Meeting Requirements, Flock Camera Hold, and Vape Recycling Inquiry
summary: Multiple items covered: (1) Parkside Commons (item 43) held — council requests developer schedule at least three more community meetings; (2) Item 44 sent back to planning commission; (3) Flock camera ordinance (item 45) held pending Axon contract resolution; (4) Chief Russen confirms DWI item (46) ready; (5) CRB reappointment (48) ready. Additionally, Council member Caldwell inquires about vape disposal — OCRRA director of recycling explains vapes contain batteries and pharmaceuticals requiring separate management; state advisory committee developing a program. Public hearing on battery moratorium scheduled for that evening.
